---
title: "SpaceApps Junior Challenge"
title-block-style: none
subtitle: "Redirecting..."
description: "Redirecting to the SpaceApps Junior Challenge page for space innovation hackathon details and registration information."
page-layout: custom
toc: false
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>.m { --c: #F5A623; }</style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">
<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0;url=/academy/programs/hackathons/spaceapps-junior.html" />
<script>window.location.href = "/academy/programs/hackathons/spaceapps-junior.html";</script>
</div>
```

If you are not redirected automatically, please [click here](/academy/programs/hackathons/spaceapps-junior.html) to access the SpaceApps Junior Challenge page.
